beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: acted
beats.summary: Brynjar arrives by river at Millbrook's dark dock and is quietly assessed by a watchful local woman.

beats.name: Adelheid
beats.label: Talk to whoever is nearby
beats.summary: Mara confirms the errand to Piotr and quietly asks Adelheid to observe the uncatalogued plants on the east terrace — with permission to take cuttings.

beats.name: Adelheid
beats.label: Head straight to Terrace Three — deliver the bundle to Piotr and keep your eyes open on the way
beats.summary: Bundle delivered to Piotr on Terrace Three east; Adelheid observes the uncatalogued silver-stemmed plants at the terrace's edge.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Crouch at the dock's edge and read the river — check the water color, current, and smell with a riverman's eye before do
beats.summary: The lamp swings once, twice, and you drop to one knee at the dock's edge without making a show of it
